babyDevelopment: The baby is continuing to build fat and refine brain and lung functions. The baby's grasp is becoming stronger. The lanugo (fine hair) is mostly gone. The eyes are developed, though the true eye color may not show until several months after birth.
bodyChanges: You might feel 'lightning' pains in your pelvis or groin as the baby's head moves against nerves. Sleep may be incredibly difficult. You may feel more pressure and discomfort in your lower back and hips.
tips: Ensure your hospital bag is in the car
Stay as relaxed as possible as you approach your due date

do: Take short, gentle walks to improve circulation

travelAdvisory.note: Avoid all travel; delivery could happen anytime.

warningSignsToWatch: Sudden extreme headache with vision changes
milestoneDescription: Almost there! Baby is refining final functions for life outside.
